publishedAbstract: * `ceph-bucket-notification` reports an error, "failed to reconcile failed to get object store from ObjectBucket" ~~~ 2023-03-14 12:17:38.936418 E | ceph-bucket-notification: failed to reconcile failed to get object store from ObjectBucket "openshift-storage/obc-openshift-storage-bucket-test": malformed BucketHost "s3.openshift-storage.svc": malformed subdomain name "s3" ~~~
publishedTitle: ceph-bucket-notification reports an error, "failed to reconcile failed to get object store from ObjectBucket"
